title: Useful Machinery
body:
<center>
  
  ![Useful Machinery](https://i.imgur.com/YoECjtX.png)
  
  This is a mod which adds simple machines for processing stuff
  
  **This mod requires [Useful Foundation](/mod/useful-foundation) and [TheMCBrosLib](/mod/themcbroslib)!**
  
  Report bugs and suggestions on the [issue tracker](https://github.com/TheMCBrothers/Useful-Machinery/issues).
  
</center>

## Features

### Machines
- Crusher
- Electric Smelter
- Compactor

### Generators
- Coal Generator
- Lava Generator

### Items
- Battery (can hold FE)
- Other Blocks
- Creative Power Cell

## Versions
- 1.20.4 (Supported)
- ~~1.20.2~~ (not planned)
- 1.20.1 (Bug Fixes)
- 1.19.x and older (END OF SUPPORT)

**Please feel free to use this mod in your modpacks!**

We don't have any plans to port the mod to older versions or to fabric!
